sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12237" key="a)pneustia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπνευ-στιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n12237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold the breath,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg036:962b:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">962b31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
